spec.title: Running PipelineRuns
spec.description: PipelineRuns currently executing (tekton_pipelines_controller_running_pipelineruns).

spec.title: Tekton Pipeline Traces
spec.description: Distributed traces emitted by the Tekton pipeline (the steps export OTLP to the collector). Use to drill into a single PipelineRun's spans.

options.content:
## Tekton CI Observability

Real-time and historical view of the **Tekton Pipelines controller** running in your cluster. Tracks every PipelineRun and TaskRun from submission through completion.

**Five signals this dashboard tracks**
- 🟢 **Health** — are pipelines succeeding? → *PipelineRun Success Rate*, *PipelineRuns by Status*, *Outcome Distribution*
- ⚡ **Speed** — how long do pipelines take? → *PipelineRun Duration* (p50 / p95 / mean), *Mean PipelineRun Duration*
- 📦 **Capacity** — is the cluster keeping up? → *Concurrent Runs*, *Pod Scheduling Latency*
- 📊 **Velocity** — how fast is CI delivering? → *CI Throughput*, *Total PipelineRuns*, *Top Pipelines by Volume*
- 📋 **Logs & Traces** — what happened in a specific run? → *Pod Logs*, *Traces*, *Log Error Rate*, *Log Volume by Level*

> **Scope:** use **Status**, **Pipeline**, and **Log Namespace** filters to narrow every panel to a specific team or pipeline · Adjust the time-range picker (top-right) to zoom into any incident window

**Step 1 · Read the KPI cards (top row)**
The four cards give you an instant snapshot for the selected window:
- **Running PipelineRuns / TaskRuns** — how many are executing *right now* (instant gauge, updates every 30 s)
- **PipelineRuns (range)** — total completions in the current time window
- **Success Rate** — 🟢 ≥ 99 % · 🟡 ≥ 80 % · 🔴 below 80 %

**Step 2 · Read the trend charts**
*PipelineRuns by Status* and *TaskRuns by Status* show completion rate (ops/s) over time broken down by outcome. A rising `failed` stack means a step is erroring. A rising `cancelled` stack often means a timeout or manual cancel.

**Step 3 · Narrow with the Log level filter**
Set **Log level → error** (or **warn**) from the dropdown at the top-left. The *Tekton Pipeline Pod Logs* panel will then show only failure events from the Tekton pods.

**Step 4 · Drill into a Trace**
Click any **Trace ID** in the *Tekton Pipeline Traces* table to open the full span waterfall — shows exactly which Task step took the longest or produced an error span.

**Duration regression**
If p95 spikes while p50 stays flat → a minority of runs have an outlier step; open *Traces* to find the longest span. If all three lines (p95, p50, mean) rise together → the cluster is resource-constrained; check node CPU/memory.

**Pod scheduling latency spike (> 500 ms p95)**
A large p95–p50 gap in *TaskRun Pod Scheduling Latency* means scheduling variance — some pods wait far longer than others (node-selector mismatch, taints, or autoscaler lag). Uniformly high p50 is global scheduler pressure; check your node pool.

**Queue build-up**
*Running PipelineRuns / TaskRuns* climbing without a matching rise in completions → backlog growing. Check the Tekton controller resource limits: `kubectl top pod -n tekton-pipelines`.

**Key metric reference**

| Metric suffix | Type | What it tracks |
|---|---|---|
| `running_pipelineruns` | Gauge | Active PipelineRuns right now |
| `running_taskruns` | Gauge | Active TaskRuns right now |
| `pipelinerun_total` | Counter | Completed PipelineRuns labeled by `status` |
| `pipelinerun_duration_seconds` | Histogram | Wall-clock PipelineRun duration |
| `taskruns_pod_latency_milliseconds` | Histogram | TaskRun creation → pod start time |

## Audience Guide — what to look at

| Audience | Key Questions | Panels to open |
|---|---|---|
| **Engineering** | Are pipelines healthy? Where are failures? | Failure Rate, PipelineRuns by Status, Pod Scheduling Latency |
| **Tech Lead** | What is CI throughput? Is build time regressing? | CI Throughput, Mean Duration, Concurrent Runs, PipelineRun Duration (p50/p95) |
| **Product / Management** | How many releases shipped? What is the failure rate? | Total PipelineRuns, Failed PipelineRuns, Failure Rate %, Outcome Distribution |
| **SRE / On-call** | Is the cluster keeping up? Any pod scheduling delays? | Concurrent Runs, Pod Scheduling Latency, Log Error Rate, Logs & Traces |

> **Filters:** use **Status**, **Pipeline**, and **Log Namespace** at the top to scope every panel to a specific pipeline or team.

spec.title: Failed PipelineRuns
spec.description: Total failed PipelineRuns in the selected time range. Yellow ≥1, Red ≥5.

spec.title: Total TaskRuns
spec.description: Total TaskRuns completed in the selected time range.

spec.title: CI Throughput (runs/h)
spec.description: PipelineRuns per hour (throughput) over the selected time range.

spec.title: Mean PipelineRun Duration
spec.description: Mean PipelineRun duration. Yellow ≥5 min, Red ≥15 min.

spec.title: PipelineRun Failure Rate
spec.description: Rolling PipelineRun failure rate. Yellow >5%, Red >20%.

spec.title: Running TaskRuns
spec.description: TaskRuns currently executing (tekton_pipelines_controller_running_taskruns).

spec.title: Concurrent Runs (Executor Utilization)
spec.description: Number of concurrently running PipelineRuns and TaskRuns — indicates executor utilization.

spec.title: PipelineRun Outcome Distribution
spec.description: Donut breakdown of all PipelineRun outcomes in the selected time range.

spec.title: Top Pipelines by Volume
spec.description: Top 10 pipelines by run volume in the selected time range.

spec.title: Log Error Rate
spec.description: Rate of error-level log lines from Tekton namespaces. Spikes indicate pod/task failures.

spec.title: Log Volume by Level
spec.description: Log volume broken down by severity level. Stacked view highlights relative noise across info/warn/error.

spec.title: PipelineRun Success Rate
spec.description: Share of PipelineRuns that completed with status=success over the dashboard range.

spec.title: Total PipelineRuns
spec.description: Total PipelineRuns started in the dashboard range (tekton_pipelines_controller_pipelinerun_total).

spec.title: PipelineRuns by Status
spec.description: PipelineRun completion rate by status (success / failed / cancelled).

spec.title: PipelineRun Duration (p50 / p95 / mean)
spec.description: PipelineRun wall-clock duration percentiles (tekton_pipelines_controller_pipelinerun_duration_seconds).

spec.title: TaskRuns by Status
spec.description: TaskRuns by status (tekton_pipelines_controller_taskrun_total).

spec.title: TaskRun Pod Scheduling Latency (p50 / p95 / mean)
spec.description: Time from TaskRun creation to its pod starting (tekton_pipelines_controller_taskruns_pod_latency_milliseconds) — scheduling/startup overhead.

spec.title: Tekton Pipeline Pod Logs
spec.description: Logs from the Tekton pipeline-execution namespaces (the PipelineRun/TaskRun pods).

spec.title: Tekton CI — pipeline & task runs (controller metrics)

spec.name: level
spec.label: Log level
spec.description: Filter log panels by severity (detected_level). All = everything incl. plain-text (unknown).
